no: [LEGACY] Separate BGT-era sub-mod. In CtB v3.0+ this is consolidated into the main ctb.tp2 (BEGIN block with @800xxx tra reference). Use main CtB mod for EET installs. Removed from Mod Forge Ultimate: CtB incompatible with WeiDU 251 (DELETE_EXISTING_ANIMATIONS macro)
